creator: charon@labs.gr
text:
When buildinig BitchX from the ports with TCL enabled (WITH_TCL=yes),
        the port fails to compile because the binary object included in
        files/tcl-freebsd.o.uu references ltoa(), a function that does not
        exist in BitchX 1.0c18 source.

Fix: 

Dunno yet, I'll check the BitchX site for a newer tcl-freebsd.o.uu
        module.  I'd prefer that method instead of patching BitchX sources.
How-To-Repeat: 	
	Compile BitchX with 'make WITH_TCL=yes'.
